wpr_custom_css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Lato:ital,wght@0,100;0,300;0,400;0,700;0,900;1,100;1,300;1,400;1,700;1,900&display=swap'); .menu-item{ display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 10px; } li.wprm_before_menu_content{ width: 100%; height: auto; background: transparent; position:relative; overflow:hidden; margin-bottom: -20px !important; } .top-logo-container { background-image: url(/msmm_plaugin/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/graphic-showing-texthelper-icons-with-a-graduate-who-higher-education-hd-png-download-transparent-png-image-pngitem.png); text-align: center; background-size: cover; overflow: hidden; position: relative; padding: 10px 0 40px; } .top-logo-container:before { content: ''; background-color: #1e86f1db; height: 200px; position: absolute; width: 100%; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; } .top-logo-container .logo_bg{ background-color: #ffffff; border-radius: 100px; width: 80px; height: 80px; margin: 0 auto; position: relative; box-shadow: rgb(255 255 255) 0px 4px 20px; } .top-logo-container .logo_bg img{ padding-top: 9px; } .top-logo-container h4{ font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold; margin: 10px 0 0; position: relative; } .top-logo-container span{ font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; margin: 0px 0; position: relative; display: block; } ul#wprmenu_menu_ul{ display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; width: 100%; } ul#wprmenu_menu_ul li.menu-item.menu-item-type-post_type{ display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; position: relative; width: 130px; height: 100px; cursor: pointer; background: #ffffff; z-index: 100; transition: 150ms; margin:0px 0px 20px 13px; text-align: center; border-radius:10px; box-shadow: rgb(99 99 99 / 20%) 0px 2px 8px 0px; } ul#wprmenu_menu_ul li.menu-item.menu-item-type-post_type a{ font-size: 13px; color: #0c0303 !important; background: transparent; font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; } ul#wprmenu_menu_ul li.menu-item.menu-item-type-post_type a i{ color: #0c0303 !important; margin: 0 auto 5px auto; font-size: 30px !important; text-align: center; display: table; } li.wprm_after_menu_content { width: 100%; display: flex; margin-top: 20px !important; } li.wprm_after_menu_content .social-footer { display: inline-flex; margin: 0 auto; } li.wprm_after_menu_content .social-footer a{ padding: 0 5px; height: 35px; width: 35px; } body.admin-bar .wp-responsive-menu-demo14 #mg-wprm-wrap.cbp-spmenu-left.default { top: 45px !important; z-index: 9999999 !important; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo14 #mg-wprm-wrap ul li.wprm_before_menu_content { margin-top: 0; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo14 #mg-wprm-wrap{ width: 100%; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo14 .top-logo-container { padding: 30px 0 40px; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo14 .logo_bg { line-height: 80px; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo14 .top-logo-container .logo_bg img { max-width: 60px; line-height: 60px; padding-top: 0 !important; } .admin-bar .wp-responsive-menu-demo14 #wprmenu_menu_ul { padding: 0px 0; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo14 .menu-item { display: block !important; width: 100%; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo14 ul#wprmenu_menu_ul li.menu-item.menu-item-type-post_type { border-radius: 0; margin: 0px 0px 20px 20px; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo14 ul#wprmenu_menu_ul li.menu-item.menu-item-type-post_type a span{ color: #6a6a6a; font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo14 li.wprm_after_menu_content .social-footer a { height: auto; width: auto; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo14 li.wprm_after_menu_content .social-footer a svg { width: 25px; height: 25px; }
